interpretation_note: Primary row identifier. Not a predictor.
Descriptive geography label. Not a predictor.
Required cluster key because SA3-level predictors will be repeated onto SA2 rows.
Descriptive cluster label. Not a predictor.
Jurisdictional context. Use carefully because it may absorb state-level policy and measurement differences.

variable_label: Modelled estimated percentage with any 12-month mental disorder
interpretation_note: Primary dependent variable. ABS modelled small-area estimate, not observed diagnosis or service-contact count.

variable_label: Modelled estimated percentage with severe 12-month mental disorder
interpretation_note: Secondary dependent variable. ABS modelled small-area estimate, not observed diagnosis or service-contact count.
Use for inclusion, reliability review and sensitivity analysis. Do not use as a predictor.

variable_label: Index of Relative Socio-economic Disadvantage score
interpretation_note: Composite socioeconomic index. Likely overlaps with Census predictors and may overlap with ABS modelled outcome inputs.

variable_label: Index of Relative Socio-economic Disadvantage decile
interpretation_note: Derived from SEIFA score. Avoid duplicating score, rank and decile in the same interpretable regression model.
Area remoteness context. Do not interpret as causal effect.
